title: Maintaining fly stocks
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"araeo","text":"This short protocol describes how to maintain your fly stocks as single generation, age-matched populations. The method described encourages a health fly population, firstly, as individuals mate and oviposit during an optimal age when females are highly fecund and secondly, because the reduced crossing over of generations reduces the risk of horizontal disease\ntransmission.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Katy M Monteith
